title: do not allow port related args to be used with --network=container:
body:
we cannot set additional ports on an existing container namespace, so we should
not allow --network=container with publish or publish-all.

Resolves: #845

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: @baude I quickly hacked up this PR to remove the hard coding of options you had and use NetworkMode.
